evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for multi-counter/window support (A1-A99, B1-B99 for different service types). However, the evidence does not demonstrate that the system supports multiple counters or windows as specified. The linked use case describes a scenario with multiple counters, but there is no concrete evidence showing that the system can handle the specified range of counters or that it has been tested for this functionality.
gaps: No evidence of multi-counter/window support functionality being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
